ABOUT.TITLE: About us
ABOUT.P1: BOCCONI COMMERCIO e METALMECCANICA is specialized in services for the automotive and industrial sector, offering complete solutions for assistance, washing and rental.
ABOUT.P2: We offer technical expertise, speed and customer focus at every stage, ensuring the maximum reliability of our services.
ABOUT.MISSION_DESC: Provide reliable and professional services to ensure safety, efficiency and operational continuity for private customers and companies.
